title: Better Than Ropes
description: A Better Than Adventure mod that adds throwable rope coils to the game. Developed for version 7.2
body:
A Better Than Adventure 7.2 mod that adds a throwable rope coil item.

**Features:**
- Adds a new throwable rope coil item, which can be thrown at blocks to attach a pillar of rope 4 blocks tall.
- Multiple coils can be thrown at the same pillar of rope to extend it.
- If a rope pillar is obstructed from fully placing 4 rope blocks, the remainder will drop on the ground as regular rope block items.
- Replaced the texture of the existing rope block "item" with a smaller length of rope.
- Break a piece of rope while sneaking to break and instantly collect the rest of the rope below it.
- Craftable with just 4 pieces of regular rope, making it very convenient for spelunking!
